title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud announced new capabilities in Cloud Run for deploying AI agent and inference workloads with improved serverless scaling and operational efficiency. The session covers latest features enabling seamless application scaling while reducing operational overhead for AI-driven development.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers new Cloud Run capabilities aimed at deploying AI agent and inference workloads on a serverless platform. It matters because it targets the operational overhead and scaling demands specific to AI-driven applications. The key takeaways: Cloud Run adds features for running inference and agent workloads, improves serverless scaling, and reduces operational management while applications scale.
